title: Biden honors Civil Rights Act
shortDescription: President Biden spoke about looking to the future and protecting civil rights at the LBJ Library in Austin, Texas.

title: Trump campaign releases official platform
shortDescription: Here are some of the proposals in Donald Trump's "Agenda47," his official campaign platform.

title: Venezuela election unrest could provoke new exodus to the US
shortDescription: Nearly 8 million Venezuelans have fled because of corruption and runaway inflation during Maduro's 13-year rule.

title: Lawmaker's death creates ballot complication for Hawaii voters
shortDescription: Hawaii primary voters face unusual situation: deceased State Rep. Nakashima remains on ballot as the sole candidate.

title: No need to replace or withdraw Biden's name from ballots | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden wasn't formally nominated by the Democratic Party so his name would not need to be "withdrawn" from any ballots.

title: Biden proposes constitutional amendment limiting presidential immunity
shortDescription: Biden outlined a vision for the future including Supreme Court term limits and a constitutional amendment to llimit the immunity of the president.

title: Trump calls Harris 'evil' as party struggles to coalesce on attacks
shortDescription: Republicans are trying several strategies to attack Kamala Harris. Donald Trump called her 'evil' at a rally in St.Cloud Minnesota. Watch video.

title: President Biden calls for SCOTUS reforms
shortDescription: None of Biden's proposals have any chance of passing in a divided Congress.

title: Do campaign war chests win elections?
shortDescription: U.S. elections require massive amounts of funding. Here's what we know about how much campaign war chests make or break a candidate.

title: Trump gunman spotted 90 minutes before shooting, texts show
shortDescription: Members of the Beaver County SWAT team cited communication failures with the Secret Service but acknowledged that "we all failed that day."

title: Will Biden pack the Supreme Court? What to know about his proposals
shortDescription: Don't expect a Biden to suddenly pack the Supreme Court to balance out the current conservative super-majority. Here's what to know about the election-year proposals.

title: Blinken: US has 'concerns' about Venezuela election result
shortDescription: Secretary of State Antony Blinken said he has "serious concerns" about the election results in Venezuela after both major candidates claimed victory.

title: Venezuela's president, opposition rival both claim election victory
shortDescription: President Nicolas Maduro and opposition rival Edmundo Gonzalez both claimed victory in Venezuela's presidential election as other countries cast doubt on official results.

title: Biden calls for sweeping Supreme Court changes
shortDescription: None of Biden's proposals have any chance of passing in a divided Congress. But they play to the Democratic base upset about the conservative court.

title: Kamala Harris voters in Georgia 'not going back' on abortion
shortDescription: “I want my reproductive rights back. That’s the bottom line." Georgia women say abortion access is their top issue for the 2024 election.

title: US presidential betting odds narrow one week into Harris, Trump race
shortDescription: VP Kamala Harris narrowed her odds against former President Donald Trump in her first week in the presidential race. See the latest election odds.
